summary: Ran the first controlled Antigravity/Claude Code runtime launch for SpecBridge. SpecBridge prepared a bounded executor packet, Claude Code ran non-interactively with Read/Write tools only, Claude wrote one allowed runtime evidence artifact, and Codex recorded validation, audit, and repository memory for issue 061.
validations: Claude Code bounded executor invocation: passed
policy_result: Passed. The task stayed inside the issue 061 contract scope. Claude Code wrote only .specbridge/runtime-evidence/issue-061-claude-runtime-executor-output.md, and Codex updates were limited to declared contract, scope, handoff, executor packet, runtime evidence, report, audit, documentation, context, README, acceptance test memory, and the branch orchestration smoke test maintenance needed for mixed executor packet sets.
risk_result: Medium risk because the task launches a live Claude Code runtime from the Antigravity workspace. Risk is controlled by a single evidence-only Claude write path, Read/Write tool restriction, no product runtime code, no dependency installation, no secrets, no production configuration, no auth or billing changes, no CI/CD weakening, and no deployment.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
The runtime launch proves the executor loop at evidence-only scope; a future contract is still required before any source-backed runtime implementation slice.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, and required merge gates.
